chapter_title: Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
text:
(a) An on-premise or off-premise sign must be designed to resist wind loads as follows:

(b) Under this section, the height of a sign is measured above the average level of the ground adjacent to the structure.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.043 — Wind Load Pressure Restrictions

(a) An on-premise or off-premise sign must be designed to resist wind loads as follows:

(b) Under this section, the height of a sign is measured above the average level of the ground adjacent to the structure.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: An on-premise or off-premise sign must be designed to resist wind loads as follows:

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Under this section, the height of a sign is measured above the average level of the ground adjacent to the structure.
